Products / Power Transformers

Power Transformers

High-reliability oil-immersed and dry-type transformers for industrial, utility, and commercial applications.

IEC/GB

Standards Certified

99.5%+

Typical Efficiency

30yr

Design Lifetime

IP54

Max Protection Class

Heavy Duty

50kVA – 63MVA

Oil-Immersed Power Transformers

High-reliability oil-immersed transformers for utility substations, industrial plants, and large commercial installations. Designed for long operational lifetimes with minimal maintenance.

  • IEC / GB / ANSI standards
  • ON/OFF load tap changer
  • ONAN / ONAF cooling
  • Oil temperature monitoring
  • Low loss amorphous core option
Request Quote
Indoor Safe

30kVA – 20MVA

Dry-Type Power Transformers

Epoxy resin cast dry-type transformers ideal for indoor installations in hospitals, commercial buildings, data centers, and metro systems where fire safety is critical.

  • Class F / H insulation
  • IP00 to IP54 enclosures
  • Self-extinguishing resin
  • Low partial discharge
  • No fire / explosion risk
Request Quote
Custom

As Required

Special Purpose Transformers

Custom-engineered transformers for specialized applications including EV charging stations, electrolysis systems, and other non-standard industrial processes.

  • EV charging station supply
  • Rectifier / furnace types
  • Scott connection (3-phase to 2-phase)
  • Autotransformers
  • Custom specification design
Request Quote
